00:05:41	marco:	Hey folks!
00:07:44	matheusfranco:	Reacted to "Hey folks!" with 👋
00:27:02	marco:	Very cool!
00:27:15	Yann Vonlanthen:	Great presentation! could you explain how the privacy metric is defined?
00:32:20	Gottfried Herold:	How do you treat censhorship issues that might arise due to long initial low fan-out paths? Do you have some analysis if nodes start censoring?
00:40:32	Gottfried Herold:	I mean, at some point we would hope that we only send out one (aggregate) attestation rather than spread out different attestation (if arbitrary, incremental aggregation via STARKs becomes a reality).
00:44:08	Raúl Kripalani:	good news gotti, we have a proposal submitted for Hegotá to do something like that
00:44:23	Raúl Kripalani:	https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/blob/master/EIPS/eip-8243.md
00:44:45	Yann Vonlanthen:	Reacted to How do you treat cen... with "👍"
00:45:00	Raúl Kripalani:	zk not necessary in the current threat model, but probably worthwhile in a more adversarial one like we've discussed before
00:45:13	Raúl Kripalani:	@Gottfried Herold ^^
00:45:35	Raúl Kripalani:	this is budging up against physical validator consolidations in the network fwiw
00:45:56	Gottfried Herold:	Yeah, I am aware of that. My concern is that EIP8243 will become obsolete once aggregation via (non-zk) STARKs becomes a reality.
00:46:13	Gottfried Herold:	(Until then, I think 8243 is a good idea, I think)
